creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
>>>>> "MB" == Martin Blapp <mb@imp.ch> writes:

MB> I've confirmed it to be a fresh new problem. Kdelibs2.0 compiles fine with
MB> FreeBSD 4.1STABLE, FreeBSD 4.2RELEASE, but not with 4.2 STABLE.

I just did:

cd /usr/ports/x11/kdelibs2
make

and it worked fine:

gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/u/onceler1/usr/ports/x11/kdelibs2/work/kdelibs-2.0'
2738.920user 473.473sys 84.2%, 2059ib 726ob 2239tx -3611da -1371to 0swp 1:03:31.67
[root@onceler]# pwd
/usr/ports/x11/kdelibs2
[root@onceler]# uname -a
FreeBSD onceler.kciLink.com 4.2-STABLE FreeBSD 4.2-STABLE #10: Mon Dec  4 10:52:12 EST 2000     khera@onceler.kciLink.com:/u/onceler1/usr/src/sys/compile/ONCELER  i386
[root@onceler]# 

My 4.2-STABLE "world" is from Nov 30.  My box has a PIII-450, 256Mb
RAM, and never went to swap at all.
